task: Find a condo for rent in Houston, TX, with a monthly rent of no more than 30% of an income of $8000. The condo should have a minimum area of 600 square feet, and the move-in date is the 1st of next month.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully used Apartments.com to search Houston condo rentals and applied the key constraints: price under $2,400 (30% of $8,000), minimum 600 sq ft, and move-in date June 1, 2026. Evidence shows the filtered results URL included `sfmin=600&mid=20260601`, and the page displayed `Move In Jun 1` with `All Filters 4`. The agent then opened a listing detail page for `16111 Aspenglenn Dr Unit 609` where the page showed: rent `$925`, `681 sq ft`, and `Home Type Condominium`. Although the detail page said `Available Now` and also listed `Property Available on 12/19/25`, the search results page explicitly enforced the June 1, 2026 move-in filter and still included this listing, which is sufficient under the judging guidance. Therefore the user was given a valid condo matching the requested constraints.
final_result_response:
I found a match on Apartments.com:

**16111 Aspenglenn Dr Unit 609, Houston, TX 77084**  
https://www.apartments.com/16111-aspenglenn-dr-houston-tx-unit-609/5tw5hzm/

- **Rent:** $925/month, under the $2,400 max
- **Income rule:** $8,000 x 30% = **$2,400**
- **Home type:** Condominium
- **Size:** 681 sq ft, over 600 sq ft
- **Availability:** Available Now, so it should work for a **June 1, 2026** move-in
- **Beds/Baths:** 1 bed, 1 bath
- **Notes:** Gated condo community, pool, carport, washer/dryer hookup, water/sewer/trash included per listing description.
action_history: Opening Apartments.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/');
Searching for Houston condo rentals: await page.locator('e201').fill('condo for rent in Houston, TX under $2400 at least 600 square feet move in June 1, 2026');
Searching for Houston condo rentals: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Setting minimum square footage: await page.locator('e661').click();
Choosing 600 square feet minimum: await page.locator('e683').click();
Removing maximum square footage: await page.locator('e662').click();
Choosing no maximum square footage: await page.locator('e981').click();
Opening move-in date filter: await page.locator('e623').click();
Selecting June 1, 2026: await page.locator('.datepicker-days td[date-actual="Mon Jun 01 2026 00:00:00 GMT-0700 (Pacific Daylight Time)"]').click();
Opening a matching listing: await page.locator('e584').click();
Opening first matching condo detail: await page.locator('e2170').click();
Checking another listing detail: const detail2 = await openTab('https://www.apartments.com/16111-aspenglenn-dr-houston-tx-unit-609/5tw5hzm/');
